mnemonics: PLACES: Pandas Library Acts as your Complete Excel Suite. Think of using pandas to 'place' all your Excel data into a DataFrame for analysis.
keyPoints: pd.read_excel() is the primary function for reading Excel files (.xlsx, .xls) into a DataFrame.
The sheet_name parameter is crucial for specifying which worksheet to read (by name or index).
DataFrames can be written back to Excel using the .to_excel() method, requiring a filename and optional sheet_name.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to install the required 'openpyxl' or 'xlrd' engine library (pip install openpyxl) for reading/writing .xlsx files.
Not specifying the sheet_name parameter and unintentionally reading only the first sheet, missing data on other tabs.
